title: Why Wiki is dumb
wikitext:
[]: Why Wiki is dumb...             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu May 05, 2005 8:14 pm http://www.evangelion.us/index.php?title=Akagi_Ritsuko

[]:             Quote Post by rip3mwk » Thu May 05, 2005 8:36 pm All I have to say is: wow...

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu May 05, 2005 8:53 pm The sheer stupididity of that is pretty funny actually. I can see it now, what Gendo really said during his last scene with Ritsuko in end of eva... Who exactly writes wikipedia anyway? My only real exposure to wikipedia was when I had to look up how to spell a bunch of words in L337 for a project I was doing awhile back.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu May 05, 2005 9:03 pm wow she must have been talking to gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by rip3mwk » Fri May 06, 2005 12:32 am hmmm... *ponders how many reactions can possibly be posted on this thread until it becomes off topic*

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 06, 2005 12:59 am Okay, so there's nothing there?

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Fri May 06, 2005 1:30 am that's not Wikipedia. That's just some Eva wiki site. Wikipedia's entry on Eva is actually quite good and filled with information. If you find something wrong, just fix it. http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Neon_Genesis_Evangelion

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 06, 2005 1:33 am There's still some crap on the Wikipedia site. I've fixed a few things here and there -- see if you can guess what Reichu wrote! :P

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Fri May 06, 2005 1:52 am there will always be crap on Wikipedia, but it's an amazing accomplishment, nonetheless, and an invaluable resource for certain types of information. i'm a big fan of site, myself. once i get some time, i'm gonna totally rewrite the entry on Gainax.

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Fri May 06, 2005 10:09 pm Otaprince wrote: there will always be crap on Wikipedia, but it's an amazing accomplishment, nonetheless, and an invaluable resource for certain types of information. i'm a big fan of site, myself. once i get some time, i'm gonna totally rewrite the entry on Gainax.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon May 09, 2005 11:56 pm It's the empirical evidence that in diversity wealth lies.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 10, 2005 12:33 am I guess that is a good thing for the Commentary.
